projects.title: Zombies
projects.tagline: Co-op zombie survival with Steam integration.
projects.description: Multiplayer 3D project using Unity and Steamworks with a focus on moment-to-moment gameplay and online co-op.
details: Multiplayer 3D game created in Unity Engine.
Uses Steamworks for online services.
Focus on cooperative gameplay and session flow.

projects.title: Smoke'n'Sail
projects.description: A stylised pirate game built in 24 hours for the Meet-IT Game Jam 2024, awarded first place.
details: Game-Jam first place winner at Meet-IT Game Jam 2024.
Created in Unity Engine during a 24-hour jam.
Developed in cooperation with a 5-person team.

projects.title: OnGrid
projects.tagline: Eco-city mobile app concept from StartIT Antwerp.
projects.description: Mobile app UX concept for an eco-city challenge, designed and prototyped during the StartIT international project in Antwerp.
details: StartIT international project held in Antwerp in 2024.
Teams were tasked with creating an eco-city app prototype.
10-day project, concluded with a live presentation.

projects.title: DirectX Engine
projects.tagline: Custom graphics engine with basic input and shaders.
projects.description: A simple graphics engine written in modern C++ using DirectX, featuring basic rendering, input handling and shader support.
details: Graphic engine created with C++ and DirectX.
Includes basic input management and shaders.
Capable of rendering triangles and simple shapes.

projects.title: Chezle
projects.tagline: Puzzle mobile game with rewarded ads.
projects.description: Mobile puzzle game built with Unity and Android SDK, featuring integrated rewarded ads and multiple handcrafted levels.
details: Mobile game created with Unity Engine and Android SDK.
Implements an advertising API that grants hints for watching an ad.
Includes multiple levels and unique mechanics.
Preparing for publication on the Google Play Store.

projects.title: Java Swing Paint
projects.tagline: Desktop paint clone built in Java Swing.
projects.description: A Windows-style paint clone implemented with Java Swing, supporting free drawing, shapes, text tools and custom palettes.
details: Paint-like desktop application created in Java Swing.
Supports free drawing, shapes, text and custom color palettes.
Allows saving projects and opening PNG files.

projects.title: Web Checkers
projects.tagline: Interactive 3D checkers board in a room scene.
projects.description: A three.js powered 3D room scene with an interactive checkers board and piece movement driven by raycasting.
details: Room scene with an interactive checkers board built in three.js.
Allows moving pieces via raycasting on the board.

projects.title: Brozard
projects.tagline: Co-op top-down shooter built with a friend.
projects.description: A 2D top-down shooter built in Unity in collaboration with a friend, focusing on tight controls and co-op gameplay.
details: 2D top-down shooter created in Unity Engine.
Developed together with a friend.

projects.title: QT Calculator
projects.tagline: Desktop calculator with string-based expression evaluation.
projects.description: Calculator application built with C++ and Qt, featuring string evaluation for flexible mathematical input.
details: Calculator created in Qt with C++.
Supports string-based expression evaluation.
